action.reasoning: Iteration 1 baseline exploration_score=0.1428 (success_rate 0.21). To improve, we need a learned planner. I'll implement a DQN-style agent using a CNN on the global belief map and a per-neighbor Q-value head. Architecture: small CNN (2 channels: belief map + robot heatmap) → feature map, then sample features at neighbor locations + node utility/distance → Q. Training: collect episodes with epsilon-greedy, sparse reward = 300/distance if success else 0, train with MSE on returns. I'll write model.py, utils.py, train.py, and update predict.py to load the model. Then train for 50 episodes as a quick test, save checkpoint, and submit evaluation to measure iteration time and see initial learning signal.
